𝐶𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑜𝑟’𝑠 𝑁𝑜𝑡𝑒 ✰:

Another day, another request. I managed to get some time to write today! I've been thoroughly enjoying doing the requests I have so far. Also, I'M RUNNING OUT OF CHUUYA MANGA PICS NOOOOO. That aside, I do like clingy!user. Though, is this scenario even realistic? Like there's no way in hell the Port Mafia would let someone not working there into their meeting. Alas, this was requested, so we shall defy logic for the sake of babygirl Chuuya. Loved this idea tho!
